sql.i: select count(1) from abs_home_zj where cpath={cpath} and $unequal(rowguid,rowguid)
select count(1) from abs_home_user where userguid={userguid} and czjguid={czjguid}
delete from abs_home_user where userguid={userguid} and czjguid={czjguid}
select * from abs_home_zj where $like(cname,cname) order by ordernum desc
select rowguid,czjguid,zjname,ordernumber,userguid from abs_home_user where userguid={userguid} order by ordernumber desc
select rowguid,cname,cpath,ordernum,addtime from abs_home_zj where rowguid={rowguid}
